about_mission: Our mission is to help every student achieve their educational goals
faq_q1: How long does IELTS preparation take?
faq_a1: The average preparation time is 3–6 months depending on your starting level and target score. We will create a personalized study plan for you.
faq_a2: We offer group classes (up to 8 students), individual lessons, and an online format. You can choose whichever option suits you best.
faq_q3: How much does the program cost?
faq_a3: The cost depends on the program and format. Contact us to get up-to-date pricing.
faq_a4: The Digital SAT is a computer-based format of the SAT exam. We prepare students specifically for this format.
faq_q5: Do you help with university admissions abroad?
faq_a5: Yes! We help with university selection, document preparation, personal statement writing, and application submission.
faq_a6: Yes, you can take a free trial lesson and have your level assessed.
faq_q7: Can I take a level test for free?
faq_a7: Yes, our website offers free placement tests: General English, IELTS, and SAT.
